chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1550 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.6272/2022 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 19.12.2023 Mr. Manoj Kumar Tejwani, Advocate for petitioner. Respondent No.6 is present in person. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the petitioner has filed a statement seeking discharge of his vakalatnama on the ground that he has already issued notices to the petitioner in this respect. The petitioner even then is called absent without any intimation although a last chance on the last date of hearing was given to him to argue this case. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
